mnemonics: CPU-RAM-DISK: Can't Process Unless RAM & Disk Keep pace (Monitor CPU, memory, and storage utilization trends)
keyPoints: Establish baseline performance metrics before capacity issues occur
Use historical data and growth trends to project future resource needs
Implement monitoring alerts for key performance indicators before thresholds are breached
commonMistakes: Only monitoring current usage without projecting future needs
Focusing on a single resource (e.g., CPU) while ignoring others (e.g., memory, storage, network)
Waiting until performance degrades before planning for capacity increases
